description: Sybill is an AI sales assistant and meeting note-taker for revenue teams. It captures and summarizes customer conversations, drafts follow-ups, updates CRM systems, and surfaces deal insights.
summary: Sybill exposes a known MCP server at `https://mcp.sybill.ai/mcp` (streamable HTTP); no public REST/GraphQL API or CLI documentation was found on `sybill.ai`, and authentication details for the MCP endpoint could not be determined from public pages.
